productDisplayName: Nike Women As The Windru Blue Jackets
description: Composition Blue and White jacket made of 100% polyester, with an interior pocket on the left side, zippered side pockets for secure storage, hood with drawstring and a classic hood Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean The Windrunner became the face of nike apparel in 1978, at a time when the company was known for its footwear. Today, this ultimate running jacket is still as relevant and exciting as it was back then. In its 32-year history, the nike Windrunner has stayed true to its principles with 26-degree chevron styling, excellent breathability and unparalleled weather resistance. Originally designed for runners, the Nike Windrunner women's Jacket delivers lightweight comfort and weather resistance in an iconic style that goes anywhere. This lightweight layer features a standard Fit and hits at the hip. The waist and cuffs are ribbed for a snug, comfortable fit. This jacket is made of recycled, water-resistant fabric designed to keep rain out and limit environmental impact. It also features a breathable mesh lining to help you stay dry and comfortable when things heat up.
